positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a whimsical forest scene. Central subject is a stylized, glowing fox curled up among oversized, abstracted flora. The style is inspired by contemporary nature-themed prints, featuring bold, clean linework and solid color blocks. Composition should utilize negative space for impact, with the fox and plant elements creating a harmonious circular flow. Color palette: deep indigo blue, vibrant emerald green, burnt orange, and touches of ethereal gold. Lighting should be stylized and uniform, simulating illuminated watercolor against a clean white background. High contrast silhouette, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low detail, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, busy background, photorealism, gradient, messy, dirty
